Finding: Attendance API accepts unvalidated student IDs and can create possible cross-tenant data contamination if a foreign student ID is supplied.
Evidence: API creates attendance records from submitted studentId values; RLS checks session institution but not student institution.
User impact: False attendance and possible wrong-student records.
Business impact: Blocks paid launch for multi-tenant SaaS trust.
Recommended action: Validate each student belongs to institution, class, and active academic scope; add DB/RLS consistency tests.

Finding: Teacher class scope is enforced on attendance list but not on attendance detail/API.
Evidence: List page uses getTeacherClassIds; detail page fetches any class by id and institution; API lacks assigned-class check.
User impact: Teacher can alter another class attendance by deep link or direct POST.
Business impact: Breaks role promise and school trust.
Recommended action: Apply shared teacher class authz helper to page and API.

Finding: Parent Razorpay payment is not usable while public copy claims UPI/Razorpay fee collection.
Evidence: Parent pages say online payment is coming soon; landing/pricing claim payment support.
Security impact: None direct, but payment trust risk.
Recommended action: Complete parent payment or remove claims until complete.

Finding: Razorpay webhook lacks stored order, amount, currency, and invoice reconciliation.
Evidence: Webhook verifies signature but trusts payment notes/invoice ID and amount.
Recommended action: Persist orders and reconcile order_id, amount, currency, invoice, institution, status, and event id.

Finding: Manual payments lack idempotency and concurrency protection.
Evidence: Route checks remaining balance then creates payment without lock/idempotency key.
Recommended action: Add idempotency keys and transaction/locking pattern; test concurrent submissions.

Finding: Receipt generation mutates state on GET.
Evidence: GET can assign receipt number through admin update.
User impact: Unexpected state changes and race-prone receipt numbers.
Recommended action: Assign receipt numbers in explicit transaction or idempotent POST/payment finalisation.

Finding: Push send endpoint can fail open if PUSH_SEND_TOKEN is unset.
Evidence: Token check only runs when env var exists; no userId targets all subscriptions.
User impact: Users can receive arbitrary notifications in misconfigured production.
Recommended action: Require token/auth unconditionally and fail closed; tenant-scope sends.

Finding: Communications use ConsoleProvider and may mark messages sent without real delivery.
Evidence: Console provider logs message and returns success.
User impact: Staff think parents received messages when they did not.
Recommended action: Separate queued/sent/delivered/failed; require real provider for production.

Finding: Direct staff creation shares plaintext generated passwords.
Evidence: Password generated with Math.random and returned/shared via WhatsApp.
Recommended action: Use invite/reset/OTP; crypto random if temporary; force reset; never expose reusable passwords.

Finding: Homework uploads use public URLs and weak content validation.
Evidence: Service-role upload accepts MIME/type and returns public URL.
User impact: Unsafe files or child data may become public.
Recommended action: Use private bucket/signed URLs, role/class checks, content validation, audit logs.

Finding: CSV exports are formula-injection vulnerable.
Evidence: CSV escaping does not neutralise values starting with =,+,-,@, tab, or CR.
User impact: Opening exports can trigger malicious formulas.
Recommended action: Escape dangerous cells and add malicious CSV tests.

Finding: Offline claims exceed implementation and stale cache can return expired data.
Evidence: Service worker handles push only; stale cache condition returns data after max age.
User impact: Users may trust stale or unsynced records.
Recommended action: Fix cache expiry; implement or narrow offline claims; add conflict/logout failed-sync UX.

Finding: Sensitive actions are not consistently audit logged.
Evidence: Audit table/page exists but coverage is sparse for attendance, fees, students, exports, communications.
Recommended action: Add shared audit helper and cover critical create/update/delete/export/payment actions.

Finding: Lint fails.
Evidence: pnpm lint returned 4 errors and 18 warnings.
User impact: Quality issues remain visible to users indirectly.
Recommended action: Fix lint errors and set lint as release gate.

Finding: Tenant-scoped uniqueness and performance indexes are incomplete.
Evidence: Schema/index review found weak duplicate and query coverage for admissions/messages/homework/notices/invoices/students.
User impact: Duplicates and slow lists at scale.
Recommended action: Add constraints/indexes with migration tests.

Finding: Production health monitoring and runbooks are missing.
Evidence: No health check, structured request IDs, error tracking, backup/restore runbook, or webhook monitoring found.
Recommended action: Add health route, Sentry/OpenTelemetry or equivalent, logs, alerts, backup/restore and webhook runbooks.

Finding: Public privacy, terms, support, refund/cancellation, and data ownership pages are missing or incomplete.
Evidence: Landing/public review found no complete trust surface.
Recommended action: Add trust/legal/support pages with qualified legal review.

Finding: Telugu UI can render while document language remains English.
Evidence: Browser showed Telugu labels; root language appears static.
Recommended action: Set dynamic lang or mark Telugu text with lang attributes.

Finding: Attendance status controls are below 44px touch-target width on 360px viewport.
Evidence: Browser measurement showed about 40px width.
Recommended action: Increase touch target width and retest 320/360 widths.

Finding: Skip link and some icon labels are missing or unclear.
Evidence: Layout/page review and attendance snapshot.
Recommended action: Add skip link and accessible names for icon-only controls.

Finding: Technical SEO basics are missing.
Evidence: No robots.txt, sitemap.xml, canonical, structured data, OG/Twitter images found.
User impact: Lower discoverability and poor link previews.
Recommended action: Add SEO basics and private-route indexing rules.

Finding: Landing page lacks focused ICP, proof, pricing/contact clarity, and real product screenshots.
Evidence: Static landing review.
User impact: Buyers do not quickly understand why to choose EduOps.
Recommended action: Reposition for coaching/tuitions and add truthful proof/screenshots/contact/pricing.

Finding: Several APIs expose raw error strings to clients.
Evidence: Route review saw String(e)/raw error patterns.
Recommended action: Use safe error responses and log details server-side.

Finding: Rate limiting is inconsistent or missing.
Evidence: Review did not find systematic limits for OTP, imports, reminders, exports, sends.
Recommended action: Add shared rate limiting for sensitive/high-cost endpoints.

Finding: Parent token links are long-lived bearer credentials with weak lifecycle controls.
Evidence: Token generated once; no expiry/rotation/revocation UI found.
User impact: Shared links can expose child data.
Recommended action: Add expiry, rotation, revocation, audit, and regeneration UX.

Finding: DPDP/children data readiness is incomplete.
Evidence: No complete consent, retention, deletion, correction, vendor inventory, breach workflow found.
Recommended action: Add privacy/consent/retention/deletion/export workflows and get legal review.

Finding: No request IDs or structured support diagnostics found.
Evidence: Static review.
Recommended action: Add request IDs, structured logs, and support-safe diagnostic views.

Finding: No broad E2E/API/payment/offline/accessibility test suite found.
Evidence: Only lint/type/build/RLS scripts were evident.
Recommended action: Add prioritized Playwright/API/RLS/payment/offline/a11y tests.

Finding: Academic year data model has consistency risk.
Evidence: Class has both string academicYear and academicYearId style fields.
Recommended action: Consolidate or enforce consistency through migration/validation.

Finding: Admissions CRM is closer to a lead board than a full follow-up workflow.
Evidence: Browser showed empty Kanban; review found missing reminders/history/duplicate tests.
Recommended action: Add follow-up dates, duplicate detection, call/WhatsApp actions, history, conversion attribution.

Finding: Core accountant reports are incomplete.
Evidence: Fees rendered KPIs/list but no daily collection, ageing, collector tracking evidence.
Recommended action: Add daily collection, payment mode, outstanding ageing, and collector reports.

Finding: Large-list mobile behaviour is unproven.
Evidence: Browser tested small seed data only.
User impact: Performance/usability may fail at real scale.
Recommended action: Seed large data and run mobile task tests.

Finding: Dependency audit reports vulnerabilities.
Evidence: pnpm audit found 8 vulnerabilities.
Recommended action: Triage and upgrade/pin affected packages; distinguish dev/prod exposure.

Finding: Fee class filters show duplicate visible class labels when sections share class name.
Evidence: Browser saw duplicate Class 6 options.
Recommended action: Include section/group label consistently.

Finding: Empty states need clearer next actions and support links.
Evidence: Browser showed several blank module states.
User impact: Users may not know setup path.
Recommended action: Add role-aware CTAs and setup guidance.

Finding: RLS, withRls, and prismaAdmin patterns need architecture documentation.
Evidence: Codebase uses all three patterns without central allowlist doc found.
User impact: New changes may bypass intended safety.
Recommended action: Create security architecture doc and admin-use allowlist.

Finding: No route-level performance budget found.
Evidence: Build inspected but no budget/CI threshold.
Recommended action: Add Lighthouse/bundle budgets for key routes.

Finding: No local/segment SEO content found.
Evidence: Public review.
Recommended action: Add coaching/tuitions/school content after ICP validation.

Finding: Contextual help for import, fees, and attendance is thin or missing.
Evidence: Route/browser review.
Recommended action: Add short help snippets, templates, and videos.

Finding: No status page found.
Evidence: Public review.
Recommended action: Add simple status page after first pilots.

Finding: Pricing willingness for coaching centres is unvalidated.
Evidence: Market analysis and assumptions.
Recommended action: Interview 10-20 buyers and run 3-5 pilots.

Finding: Need to validate whether online Razorpay or manual UPI/cash tracking matters more first.
Evidence: Product-market analysis.
Recommended action: Ask pilots about current collection modes and trust barriers.

Finding: Need to validate parent preference for token links, OTP login, or WhatsApp-only updates.
Evidence: Parent workflow analysis.
Recommended action: Test with parents in pilots.

Finding: Need to validate first 30-day accountant reports.
Evidence: Fees/accountant analysis.
User impact: Reports may not match real collection practice.
Recommended action: Interview accountants and compare current spreadsheets.

Finding: Need to validate Telugu localisation scope.
Evidence: Browser saw Telugu nav; market analysis.
Recommended action: Ask staff/parents which language is needed by role.
